end,function(h,X)local y=R(X)local H=function(H,Q,V,p)return D(h,{H;Q,V;p},X,y)end return H end,function(h,X)local y=R(X)local H=function(H,Q)return D(h,{H;Q},X,y)end return H end,function(h,X)local
